title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch.

title: Python for Data Science & Machine Learning
description: Master Python, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Scikit-Learn for data analysis and ML.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Design stunning user interfaces and experiences using Figma and design principles.

title: React & Redux Complete Guide
description: Build powerful React applications with Redux state management and hooks.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Certification
description: Prepare for the AWS Cloud Practitioner exam and understand core cloud concepts.

title: Advanced Node.js & Express API Development
description: Build scalable REST APIs with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and authentication systems.

title: Cybersecurity Essentials
description: Understand network security, ethical hacking, penetration testing, and threat mitigation.

title: iOS App Development with Swift
description: Build real-world iOS applications using Swift and Xcode from design to App Store deployment.

title: Blockchain & Web3 Development
description: Learn Solidity, smart contracts, Ethereum, and build decentralized applications (dApps).
